---
title: "AntSciHub"
listing:
  - id: templates-list
    contents: "Templates/**/*Template.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: _listing/templates-list.ejs.md
    fields: [title, description]
    sort: title
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

Welcome to AntSciHub v4

Very much WIP. Please excuse the dust 🏗️

{{< include front-page/_what-is-antscihub.qmd >}}

## Experiment images

The image gallery below is loaded directly from the experiment's shared Google
Drive folder. New images will appear here without requiring a site rebuild.

<iframe
  src="https://drive.google.com/embeddedfolderview?id=1_FTjq9eCrMPpMv7LBHbXa2w8Y6Adnxjn#grid"
  title="Pogonomyrmex experiment images"
  loading="lazy"
  style="width: 100%; height: 75vh; min-height: 32rem; border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color); border-radius: 0.375rem;"
></iframe>

[Open the image folder in Google Drive](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1_FTjq9eCrMPpMv7LBHbXa2w8Y6Adnxjn){target="_blank"}

## Templates

These templates are maintained as reusable Quarto starting points.

::: {#templates-list}
:::
